payload.description:
## Summary
Add a new evaluation-task visualization that shows the breakdown of misclassification categories at a glance.

## Deliverables
- Add a segmented-bar style visualization in the evaluation task UI for the four-category breakdown.
- Show counts/proportions for `score_configuration_problem`, `information_gap`, `guideline_gap_requires_sme`, and `mechanical_malfunction`.
- Present an overall assessment for whether the evaluation suggests optimization, SME clarification, upstream data remediation, or bug investigation.

## Reuse direction
Build on the existing segmented progress bar / task-stage visual language rather than inventing a wholly separate pattern.
payload.title: Add evaluation-task visualization for misclassification category breakdown
